layer1_exact_lookup_training.csv.purpose: Exact alias lookup training/loading and regression tests.
layer1_exact_lookup_training.csv.gold_rule: raw_input should resolve to canonical_degree at confidence 1.0.

layer2_fuzzy_training.csv.purpose: Fuzzy matcher threshold tuning, typo handling, and false-positive control.
layer2_fuzzy_training.csv.gold_rule: raw_input is intentionally noisy and should not be solved by exact lookup.

layer3_unstructured_training.csv.purpose: Conversational/resume-text extraction and optional NER training.
layer3_unstructured_training.csv.gold_rule: entity spans identify degree and field mentions in raw_text.

layer3_unstructured_training.jsonl.purpose: JSONL companion with entity arrays for NLP pipelines.
